name: wildlife_trade_enforcement_vendor_patch_mesa_tru_loy
premise: A contractual SLA is about to breach; the least-bad mitigation option touches privacy, safety, or fairness in uncomfortable ways. In Wildlife Trade Enforcement, the situation tagged internally around wildlife trade enforcement vendor patch mesa tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Keisha Dubois
agents.identity: I am Keisha Dubois, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Wildlife Trade Enforcement. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Kim
agents.identity: I am Jonah Kim, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Wildlife Trade Enforcement. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Keisha Dubois must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Keisha Dubois do?
